input:
Three things on the v1 ship list:

First, the bouncer-mode UI surface — toggle plus pending-attachment triage. This is the biggest UX gap right now.

Second, the wiki-types creation form. The MCP tool exists but the web form is missing.

Third, the empty-wiki bootstrap. New wikis with zero fragments need the description-as-embedding-seed pattern.
notes: Numbered list with prose. Three distinct items — each its own fragment.
